meta.description: AESOP Academy proficiency level framework with Bloom's taxonomy alignment

level-1.name: Novice
level-1.description: Recognizes basic concepts and vocabulary; can identify examples; limited ability to apply knowledge in new contexts
characteristics: Limited ability to explain why or how

exemplars.understand-ai-basics: Student can define 'machine learning' and identify it as a type of AI, but cannot explain how models are trained or why they might fail
exemplars.write-clear-prompts: Student writes simple, single-turn prompts without structure; output quality is unpredictable and depends on trial-and-error
exemplars.secure-ai-systems: Student knows that AI systems need security but cannot identify specific threats or implement protections

level-2.name: Developing
level-2.description: Understands core concepts and can apply them in familiar situations; needs some guidance for novel problems; emerging competence
characteristics: Applies knowledge in familiar, well-defined scenarios
Recognizes when to use different approaches
Seeks guidance when encountering new situations
Makes some errors in complex or ambiguous contexts
Shows improvement through practice and feedback

exemplars.understand-ai-basics: Student can explain ML paradigms, understands basic neural network concepts, and explains why models might overfit, but struggles with complex architecture choices
exemplars.write-clear-prompts: Student writes multi-turn prompts with some structure; includes context and formatting; occasionally refines based on output quality, but improvements are inconsistent
exemplars.secure-ai-systems: Student implements basic access controls and knows common vulnerabilities; can apply standard security patterns but struggles with novel threat scenarios

level-3.name: Proficient
level-3.description: Applies knowledge fluently in familiar and moderately novel contexts; can analyze problems and select appropriate solutions; demonstrates mastery
characteristics: Analyzes problems, identifies alternatives, and selects solutions
Recognizes edge cases and handles them appropriately

exemplars.understand-ai-basics: Student comprehends transformer architecture, explains why models scale with data and compute, makes informed decisions about model selection for specific tasks
exemplars.write-clear-prompts: Student crafts well-structured prompts with clear role, context, constraints; iteratively refines based on model behavior; explains design choices and anticipated outputs
exemplars.secure-ai-systems: Student designs security architecture for AI systems, anticipates attack vectors, implements protections, and explains trade-offs between security and functionality

level-4.name: Advanced
level-4.description: Solves complex, novel problems; evaluates solutions critically; creates new approaches and knowledge; demonstrates expertise
characteristics: Evaluates solutions comprehensively against multiple criteria
Contributes to field knowledge and innovation
Makes nuanced judgments in uncertain contexts

exemplars.understand-ai-basics: Student understands frontier research in ML, makes predictions about model scaling laws, designs novel architectures or training approaches, contributes to research or innovation
exemplars.write-clear-prompts: Student designs sophisticated multi-step prompting strategies, combines few-shot examples with tool calls, optimizes for latency vs. quality trade-offs, teaches prompt engineering to others
exemplars.secure-ai-systems: Student designs defense-in-depth security for AI systems, anticipates and mitigates emerging threats, contributes to industry security standards or research

bloomsTaxonomy.description: Alignment with Bloom's revised taxonomy for cognitive complexity

apply.description: Use information in a new way (apply)

create.description: Create new product or point of view (create)

assessmentTypes.description: Mixed format: MC, short answer, scenario analysis

scoreInterpretation.description: A score of 70+ (Proficient level) indicates the learner can apply concepts fluently in familiar and moderately novel contexts, analyze problems, and select appropriate solutions

below-developing.label: Below Developing
below-developing.interpretation: Still building foundational understanding; recommend review of core concepts

developing.label: Developing
developing.interpretation: Understanding emerging; can apply in familiar contexts; recommend additional practice and guidance

proficient.label: Proficient
proficient.interpretation: Demonstrates mastery; can apply fluently in familiar and moderately novel contexts; ready for advanced topics

advanced.label: Advanced
advanced.interpretation: Demonstrates deep mastery and expertise; can solve novel problems and create new approaches; ready for leadership/specialized roles

progressionLogic.description: How learners progress through proficiency levels

assessment.feedback: Constructive; focus on gaps and improvement
Developmental; explore extensions and deeper understanding
Strategic; focus on impact and contribution

mobilePathway.noviceToDevloping: Complete foundational lessons and practice quizzes; demonstrate understanding of core concepts
mobilePathway.developingToProficient: Complete applied labs and module tests; demonstrate ability to apply concepts in familiar scenarios
mobilePathway.proficientToAdvanced: Complete integration projects and advanced labs; demonstrate ability to solve novel, complex problems
